title: 'No Border Will Be Safe': Iran Warns Of Full-Scale Offensive Against US
summary_full: Tehran is ready to resume "full-scale offensive operations" if US strikes against it continue for another two or three days, a senior military advisor to Iran's supreme leader warned Friday.
summary_public: Tehran is ready to resume "full-scale offensive operations" if US strikes against it continue for another two or three days, a senior military advisor to Iran's supreme leader warned Friday.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: 'No Border Will Be Safe': Iran Warns Of Full-Scale Offensive Against US
